personal_access_token.title: Add GitHub Copilot Usage
personal_access_token.description: Connect Home Assistant to GitHub Copilot quota data using a GitHub personal access token.

device_flow.title: Add GitHub Copilot Usage
device_flow.description: Use GitHub device flow with your own GitHub OAuth app client ID. Device flow for the Copilot endpoint is experimental.

error.could_not_register: Failed to start GitHub device flow.

abort.already_configured: This GitHub account is already configured.
abort.could_not_register: Failed to start GitHub device flow.
abort.oauth_not_supported: GitHub device flow completed, but the Copilot endpoint did not accept the OAuth token.
abort.invalid_auth: GitHub did not return a usable access token.
